backendFailedMsg: The local engine could not be launched ({{error}}).
backendStoppedMsg: The local engine exited unexpectedly. Restart the app to continue.
screenRecMsg: Aguacate needs Screen Recording permission to capture system audio from your meetings.
screenRecDetail: Without it, audio from other participants (system audio) will not be recorded. Grant access in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording, then restart Aguacate.
